info.title: Nexora AI
info.description: AI-powered freelancer copilot API. Every AI-generated proposal, bid, or estimate requires explicit human approval before submission — the AI never submits on a user's behalf.

post.description:
Create a new user account and return an access/refresh token pair.

Returns **409 Conflict** if the email is already registered.

post.summary: Authenticate and obtain a token pair
post.description:
Authenticate with email and password.

Returns **401 Unauthorized** for invalid credentials or a deactivated
account. The error message is intentionally generic to avoid leaking
which emails are registered.

post.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair
post.description:
Exchange a valid, unexpired refresh token for a brand new access/refresh
token pair (refresh token rotation).

post.summary: Revoke the current access token and optional refresh token
post.description:
Log out the authenticated user by revoking the presented bearer token.

Passing the current refresh token also revokes it immediately.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's public profile.

post.summary: Change the current authenticated user's password
post.description: Change the authenticated user's password after verifying the old one.

List proposal templates for the current user

get.description: Return process liveness without touching external dependencies.
Return readiness after verifying the database connection.
Return the current application and API version metadata.

LogoutRequest.title: LogoutRequest
LogoutRequest.description: Optional refresh token to revoke alongside the bearer access token.

MessageResponse.title: MessageResponse
MessageResponse.description: Simple success response for command-style auth endpoints.

PasswordChangeRequest.title: PasswordChangeRequest
PasswordChangeRequest.description: Payload for changing the authenticated user's password.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Standard OAuth2-style token pair returned on login/register/refresh.

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Payload for registering a new user.

UserProfileUpdate.title: UserProfileUpdate
UserProfileUpdate.description: Payload for replacing a user's profile (PUT /users/me).

UserResponse.title: UserResponse
UserResponse.description: Public-facing representation of a user. Never includes the password hash.

UserRole.title: UserRole
UserRole.description: Supported platform roles for authorization decisions.
